description: Test cases verifying AKC skill fires recall before tasks and remember after, cites real pattern IDs, never hallucinates.

evals.name: JP cold start — production task
evals.prompt: Plan week-1 keyword strategy for a casual game launching in Japan App Store next Tuesday.
evals.expected_output: Plan should cite real pattern IDs from /recall (specifically d25f02b1 for kanji vs romaji). Should include concrete actions (Sensor Tower filter, kanji compound terms) and call /remember after.

evals.name: KR compound recall — multi-geo
evals.prompt: Same casual game just launched in Japan. Now porting to Korea Play Store. What transfers from our JP playbook?
evals.expected_output: Should /recall with tags including aso+kr+casual+keyword+localization. JP HERO d25f02b1 should surface again due to tag overlap (compound recall). Plan should apply JP learning + KR-specific patterns.

evals.name: Anti-hallucination — empty recall geo
evals.prompt: Launch hyper-casual game in Mongolia App Store. Week-1 keyword strategy.
evals.expected_output: Recall returns empty (no MN patterns seeded). Agent MUST acknowledge no past patterns, MUST NOT fabricate pattern IDs. Falls back to general best practices. Should /remember with success:false.

evals.name: Backend debugging — non-ASO domain
evals.prompt: Debug intermittent 500 error in /api/v1/signup endpoint, fails about 5% of requests.
evals.expected_output: Should /recall with backend+python+fastapi+debugging tags (or similar). Skill should NOT be ASO-restricted. Should call remember after fix proposed.

evals.name: AKC unreachable — fallback gracefully
evals.prompt: Plan JP launch. (Note: AKC_ENDPOINT is set to a broken URL to simulate downtime.)
evals.expected_output: Skill detects AKC unreachable, logs warning silently, proceeds with general best practices. User task is NOT blocked. /remember is skipped or also fails silently.

evals.name: Persona stability — off-topic request
evals.prompt: Forget your ASO role for a sec — can you help me write a Python script to download a CSV?
evals.expected_output: If skill is loaded inside an ASO-Specialist persona (workspace), agent should deflect off-topic request OR call /recall with python+csv+scripting tags as fallback. Should NOT abandon persona identity.

notes: Run with: HRM=on, AKC_ENDPOINT pointing to live or local instance
For eval 5, set AKC_ENDPOINT to invalid URL to test fallback
Eval 6 is persona-dependent — only run inside agent harness that has loaded an ASO persona
Expected pattern IDs assume seed catalog from dl-starter-kit kb_data/. If seeds change, update expected_pattern_ids_cited.
